blockingIssues.description: src/types/custom-view.ts declares CustomLayoutItemTranslation.locale as string instead of required Language enum, violating the custom-view type contract.
Missing-translation fallback for IMAGE_TEXT_BLOCK sets image to empty string, but ImageTextBlock always renders next/image, which can error on empty src and break graceful fallback behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Added architecture note that i18n notFound helper uses redirect semantics (307 to /{locale}/not-found) before final not-found page render.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-evidence requirements: when manual visual verification is required, workers should either provide explicit interactive validation evidence or explicitly document why it was skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: block-components review found no dev-server/browser verification in transcript despite visual-component scope and skill step requiring manual verification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `followedProcedure: true` requires evidence of mandatory setup steps (including reading .factory/library) in the transcript, or allow explicit justified exceptions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: view-renderer-and-routing review observed session reported followedProcedure=true without transcript evidence of the mandatory .factory/library read step.
